retry_reason: Put operations must only be called when the caller holds a valid reference; retrying would cause a double-put and use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a put (release) wrapper that decrements the reference count of an xfrm_state. It must be called when the caller wishes to release a previously acquired reference. After calling, the pointer must not be used again, and no further put should be performed. The operation is unconditional and always succeeds; the caller must already own a valid reference.
